title: Button Card CTA from raw overlay and center footer fields
summary: Creates a button-card with a top-level overlayLink and canonical center-footer entry, then proves its CTA text and href in the DOM.
useWhen: The changed card renderer is ButtonCard or reads overlayLink plus footer center CTA data.
The visitor-visible behavior is a Button Card CTA link on initial render.

overlayLink.description: Top-level overlay URL and expected CTA href.

sourceHints.symbol: compiled overlay and center CTA rendering
button-card routing and raw overlay/footer compilation
